page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance managed via the KVM hypervisor. The hardware configuration features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 128 physical cores, operating at one thread per core. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 6.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance features integrated GPU acceleration, bundling four NVIDIA A10 GPUs that deliver a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. Given the combination of 128 physical cores, 768 GB of RAM, and four NVIDIA A10 GPUs, this server type is designed for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science jobs, 3D rendering, and parallel computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. The hardware configuration delivers 128 dedicated vCPUs across 128 physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 768.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 6.0 GB of RAM per core. For parallel processing workloads, the instance includes four integrated NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. This server does not feature local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations, and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With dedicated CPU allocation, the instance avoids resource contention. This hardware profile is designed for parallel computing tasks, machine learning inference, data science, and graphics-intensive workloads.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated physical cores and substantial graphics memory for demanding parallel computing workloads.
